utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these categories are present. Each item includes what it should cover and includes cost information: (1) health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance with a total monthly cost and features; (2) property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with coverage limit, monthly cost, and features; (3) travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with cost and features; (4) additional_services lists enhancement services with cost and features; (5) total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. All are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan selected by the AI assistant includes multiple components all labeled under 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6'. This corresponds to the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' options in the ground-truth data for each relevant category. Specifically: (1) 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6 - Physical Health Component' matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8. (2) 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6 - Mental Health Component including family therapy' matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 8. (3) 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6 - Property Component' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 8. (4) 'LifeFirst Standard Plan6 - Travel Component' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 7. All other included services (executive health programs, concierge services, telemedicine, preventive care) are described as features within the LifeFirst plan, not separate policy choices, so we only map the main selected plans.
